item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 90 pts (0.455) Buffalo Sabres – 88 pts (0.438) Tampa Bay Lightning – 84 pts (0.431) Montreal Canadiens – 82 pts (0.414) Pittsburgh Penguins – 81 pts (0.409) New York Islanders – 81 pts (0.403) Boston Bruins – 80 pts (0.404) Detroit Red Wings – 80 pts (0.398) Columbus Blue Jackets – 79 pts (0.399) Ottawa Senators – 77 pts (0.389) Philadelphia Flyers – 74 pts (0.374) Washington Capitals – 74 pts (0.363) Toronto Maple Leafs – 70 pts (0.343) Florida Panthers – 69 pts (0.348) New Jersey Devils – 68 pts (0.343) New York Rangers – 64 pts (0.323) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
item.description: Western Conference Standings () --------------------- Colorado Avalanche – 97 pts (0.497) Dallas Stars – 94 pts (0.475) Minnesota Wild – 88 pts (0.431) Anaheim Ducks – 77 pts (0.383) Vegas Golden Knights – 76 pts (0.378) Edmonton Oilers – 75 pts (0.368) Utah Mammoth – 74 pts (0.368) Seattle Kraken – 71 pts (0.359) San Jose Sharks – 70 pts (0.359) Los Angeles Kings – 69 pts (0.348) Nashville Predators – 67 pts (0.338) Winnipeg Jets – 66 pts (0.333) St. Louis Blues – 64 pts (0.318) Chicago Blackhawks – 61 pts (0.308) Calgary Flames – 59 pts (0.298) Vancouver Canucks – 48 pts (0.242) ---------------------
